name: Uso Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, sugars, nutmeg, salt, and oil in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Remove 1/2 cup of the mixture and stir in the chopped walnuts and cinnamon for the top layer of the cake.
3. In another bowl, combine buttermilk, baking powder, soda water, and eggs. Mix well until smooth.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. The batter will be very thin.
5. Grease an 8 x 12 inch pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle the walnut-cinnamon mixture on top.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean at 350°F (175°C).
